nasb.text: At that very moment she came up and began giving thanks to God, and continued to speak of Him to all those who were looking for the redemption of Jerusalem.

esv.text: And coming up at that very hour she began to give thanks to God and to speak of him to all who were waiting for the redemption of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 就在那時候，她前來稱謝　神，並且向期待耶路撒冷蒙救贖的眾人，講論孩子的事。

ccb.text: 正在那时，她也前来感谢上帝，并把耶稣的事报告给所有盼望耶路撒冷蒙救赎的人。

csbs.text: 就在这时候，她也上前来赞颂神，向所有期待着耶路撒冷得救赎的人讲说这孩子的事。
